name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- RuntimeStateProbe and RuntimeProfiler read-only sampling now honor MCP/client cancellation and scheduler timeouts, so canceled or timed-out probes release their read slots instead of blocking captures or mutating tools.
- UniBridge_ExecutionStatus adds Action=ReapStale to cancel and release stale read-only scheduler operations, with cancellation/timed-out/reaped counters in snapshots.
- MCP smoke regression now includes a targeted RuntimeStateProbe cancel/timeout slot-release check.

### Previous Changes

- Added Tools~/McpSmokeRegression/Run-McpSmokeRegression.ps1, a repeatable MCP stdio smoke regression runner for live Unity projects.
- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence accepts Action=ReadText as a natural alias for Action=Read.
- Added a shared ProjectPathResolver used by high-risk path workflows so Assets, Packages, ProjectSettings, file URIs, and absolute project paths resolve consistently.
